qa_pairs.question: How do you initiate a file transfer using Globus after selecting the desired files or directories?
qa_pairs.answer: To initiate a file transfer in Globus, first highlight the desired file or directory by single-clicking it, or Control-clicking to select multiple items. Then, click one of the large blue buttons with white arrowheads to start the transfer.

qa_pairs.question: How are users informed about the progress and completion of a file transfer initiated through Globus?
qa_pairs.answer: Once a file transfer is initiated through Globus, it is assigned a unique ID and begins immediately. You will receive an email when the transfer is complete. You can also monitor in-progress transfers and view details of completed transfers by clicking the 'Activity' button on the left sidebar in the Globus portal.
